title: Shuyuan Shen
text:
Email
  
  
    
     Google Scholar
  
  
    
     ORCID
  
  
    
     Github
  

  
  
Shuyuan Shen is an Assistant Professor of Political Science and International Relations at Loyola Marymount University. He received his Ph.D. in Political Science from the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign. His research sits at the intersection of comparative politics and international relations, with a focus on Chinese domestic and global politics, comparative political communication, and political economy, using computational and experimental methods. His work has been published in International Studies Quarterly, World Development, and Journal of Contemporary China.





Chinese Domestic and Global Politics
Comparative Political Communication
Comparative Political Economy
Computational Social Science
